title: Shuba Duck Totem!
description:
Shuba Duck Totem! 
Walk fashionable now with Shubo duck
body:
You've probably met Shuba the duck on the Internet? and if you wanted some kind of fashionable Totem, then this resource pack is what you need!
now this duck will be with you and protect you in Minecraft in the form of a Totem!
download and enjoy!



**Just rename the totem to duck on anvil!**

__need Optifine, or its substitutes__
